tasks.title: Fix parser and lowering bugs in quench-runtime
tasks.notes: Computed member access, template literal expressions, optional chaining (member and call), for...of/for...in, rest params, ?? are implemented. Still missing: module/script fallback, real getter/setter metadata, object/array spread.

tasks.title: Complete Array, Map, Set, Promise, String, and Date built-ins
tasks.notes: Array.prototype methods, Map/Set constructors and methods, String/Date/Object.prototype, JSON.parse, native Error constructors are implemented. Still missing: Promise, iterable Map/Set (Symbol.iterator / Array.from), Array.from on iterables, Date.prototype.toLocaleTimeString.

tasks.title: Add missing language features to the interpreter
tasks.notes: for...of/for...in, ??, optional chaining, rest params, template literal expressions, arguments object are implemented. Still missing: spread in calls/literals, getter/setter invocation, typeof undeclared identifiers.

tasks.title: Fix value and prototype model
tasks.notes: Shared Object.prototype, Array.prototype, Map/Set/Date/String prototypes and new Constructor wiring are implemented. Still missing: shared Function.prototype, boxing String/Number/Boolean.

tasks.title: Fix bridge host functions and Ink globals in main crate
tasks.notes: All __ink_* functions registered, including __ink_get_node_parent and __ink_set_raw_mode. __ink_get_node_children populates elements; props are serialized as JSON.

tasks.title: Integrate event loop microtasks and verify dispatch
tasks.notes: Microtasks drained via __tb_invoke_microtasks after timers; hot reload re-registers bridge functions on the fresh context.

tasks.title: runtime.js compatibility tweaks
tasks.notes: normalizeChildren rewritten to avoid unimplemented Array.prototype.flat; runtime.js loads.

tasks.title: Verify with parity tests and example apps
tasks.notes: simple.js expected to work; counter.js/use-bridge.tsx/animations.tsx now depend mainly on spread, iterable Map/Set, Promise, getters/setters, and typeof undeclared. Unit/parity tests still need to be added.

tasks.title: Extend build.rs linter to quench-runtime and enforce limits
tasks.notes: builtins.rs, interpreter.rs, lower.rs, and value.rs currently exceed the 500-line file limit. The linter must be extended and files split/refactored to comply before it can be turned on.

tasks.title: Architecture hardening: split builtins and guard recursion
tasks.notes: Recursion guard is implemented. builtins.rs still needs splitting into submodules; value model still uses std HashMap.

tasks.title: Interpreter performance roadmap
tasks.notes: Future optimizations once runtime is correct: NaN-boxed Value, string interning, object shapes+ICs, slot-indexed environments, arena allocation, explicit eval stack.
